problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: If Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site is applied to it, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
